properties.description: Unique identifier for division-level aggregated risk record.
properties.business_rules: Must be unique, Cannot be null
properties.business_description: Unique identifier combining division and assessment date for divisional risk snapshots.
properties.data_quality_checks: Check for null values, Validate uniqueness
properties.filtering_suggestions: Filter by division, Filter by date

properties.description: Date of the division-level risk assessment.
properties.business_rules: Cannot be null, Must be a valid date, Updated daily
properties.business_description: Reference date for divisional snapshot, enabling time-series analysis of division-level compliance.
properties.data_quality_checks: Ensure not in future, Validate date format, Check for missing dates
properties.filtering_suggestions: Filter by date range, Filter by specific date
properties.aggregation_suggestions: COUNT by date, GROUP BY month

properties.description: Organizational division or business unit.
properties.common_patterns: Sales, Marketing, HR, IT, Finance, Operations
properties.business_rules: Cannot be null, Must match User_csod.division values
properties.business_description: Organizational unit for analyzing compliance risk by business division, enabling targeted interventions and accountability.
properties.data_quality_checks: Validate against User_csod division list, Check for consistency
properties.filtering_suggestions: Filter by specific division, Compare divisions
properties.aggregation_suggestions: COUNT by division, GROUP BY division

properties.description: Total number of active employees in the division.
properties.business_rules: Cannot be null, Must be > 0
properties.business_description: Division size for per-capita risk normalization and capacity planning.
properties.data_quality_checks: Ensure positive values, Validate against User_csod counts
properties.filtering_suggestions: Filter by division size ranges

properties.description: Total compliance training assignments in the division.
properties.business_rules: Cannot be null, Must be > 0
properties.business_description: Division-level compliance workload volume for resource allocation and capacity assessment.
properties.data_quality_checks: Ensure positive values, Validate reasonableness vs headcount
properties.filtering_suggestions: Filter by high volume divisions

properties.description: Average composite risk score for the division.
properties.business_rules: Cannot be null, Must be between 0 and 100
properties.business_description: Primary KPI for divisional compliance health, enabling comparison across business units and identification of high-risk divisions.
properties.data_quality_checks: Validate range 0-100, Compare across divisions for outliers
properties.filtering_suggestions: Filter by high-risk divisions (>75), Compare to organizational average
properties.aggregation_suggestions: AVERAGE across divisions, MAX, MIN, RANK

properties.description: Median composite risk score, less sensitive to outliers.
properties.business_rules: Cannot be null, Must be between 0 and 100
properties.business_description: Robust central tendency measure showing typical division risk unaffected by extreme individual cases.
properties.data_quality_checks: Validate range 0-100, Compare with avgRiskScore
properties.filtering_suggestions: Compare to average for distribution insight
properties.aggregation_suggestions: AVERAGE across divisions, COMPARE with avg

properties.description: Division's risk score percentile rank among all divisions (0-100).
properties.business_rules: Cannot be null, Must be between 0 and 100, Higher percentile = higher risk
properties.business_description: Relative risk ranking enabling quick identification of divisions performing above/below peer groups.
properties.data_quality_checks: Validate range 0-100, Ensure distribution across divisions
properties.filtering_suggestions: Filter top/bottom quartiles, Filter by high risk (>75th percentile)

properties.description: Number of critical risk assignments in the division.
properties.business_rules: Cannot be null, Must be >= 0, Must be <= totalAssignments
properties.business_description: Volume of most severe compliance risks in division requiring immediate executive attention.
properties.data_quality_checks: Ensure non-negative, Validate <= totalAssignments
properties.filtering_suggestions: Filter by non-zero, Filter by high volumes
properties.aggregation_suggestions: SUM, PERCENTAGE of totalAssignments, RANK by division

properties.description: Number of high risk assignments in the division.
properties.business_rules: Cannot be null, Must be >= 0, Must be <= totalAssignments
properties.business_description: Volume of elevated risks in division requiring proactive management.
properties.data_quality_checks: Ensure non-negative, Validate <= totalAssignments
properties.filtering_suggestions: Filter by division

properties.description: Number of moderate risk assignments in the division.
properties.business_rules: Cannot be null, Must be >= 0, Must be <= totalAssignments
properties.business_description: Volume of medium-priority risks in division for standard monitoring.
properties.data_quality_checks: Ensure non-negative, Validate <= totalAssignments
properties.filtering_suggestions: Filter by division

properties.description: Number of low risk assignments in the division.
properties.business_rules: Cannot be null, Must be >= 0, Must be <= totalAssignments
properties.business_description: Volume of low-priority risks in division with minimal intervention needed.
properties.data_quality_checks: Ensure non-negative, Validate <= totalAssignments
properties.filtering_suggestions: Filter by division

properties.description: Number of overdue assignments in the division.
properties.business_rules: Cannot be null, Must be >= 0, Must be <= totalAssignments
properties.business_description: Current compliance violations in division, critical metric for divisional leadership accountability.
properties.data_quality_checks: Ensure non-negative, Validate <= totalAssignments, Alert on increases
properties.filtering_suggestions: Filter by non-zero, Filter by high counts, Compare divisions
properties.aggregation_suggestions: SUM, PERCENTAGE of totalAssignments, RANK by division

properties.description: Percentage of completed compliance assignments in the division.
properties.business_rules: Cannot be null, Must be between 0 and 100
properties.business_description: Division-level completion performance, key metric for divisional leader performance evaluation.
properties.data_quality_checks: Validate range 0-100
properties.filtering_suggestions: Filter by low performers (<70%), Compare to org average
properties.aggregation_suggestions: AVERAGE across divisions, MAX, MIN, RANK

properties.description: Average time to complete training in the division (days).
properties.business_rules: Can be null if no completions, Must be positive
properties.business_description: Division-level efficiency metric indicating compliance velocity and culture effectiveness.
properties.data_quality_checks: Ensure positive values, Flag outliers
properties.filtering_suggestions: Filter by slow divisions (>60 days), Compare divisions
properties.aggregation_suggestions: AVERAGE across divisions, MEDIAN, MAX, RANK

properties.description: Rank of division by avgRiskScore (1 = lowest risk/best).
properties.business_rules: Cannot be null, Must be > 0, Lower is better
properties.business_description: Competitive ranking enabling healthy peer comparison and identification of best practices from top performers.
properties.data_quality_checks: Ensure positive values, Validate ranking logic
properties.filtering_suggestions: Filter top performers (rank <= 3), Filter bottom performers

properties.description: Number of assignments requiring manager escalation in division.
properties.business_rules: Cannot be null, Must be >= 0, Must be <= totalAssignments
properties.business_description: Division-level intervention workload for management resource planning.
properties.data_quality_checks: Ensure non-negative, Validate <= totalAssignments
properties.filtering_suggestions: Filter by high volumes, Compare divisions

properties.description: Average risk score normalized by headcount.
properties.business_rules: Cannot be null, Calculated as avgRiskScore * (totalAssignments / divisionHeadcount)
properties.business_description: Size-normalized risk metric enabling fair comparison across divisions of different sizes.
properties.data_quality_checks: Validate calculation, Compare across divisions
properties.filtering_suggestions: Filter high per-capita risk, Compare divisions

properties.description: Composite health score for the division (0-100).
properties.business_rules: Cannot be null, Must be between 0 and 100, Higher is better
properties.business_description: Division-level composite KPI combining risk, completion, and timeliness into single health indicator.
properties.data_quality_checks: Validate range 0-100, Ensure inverse correlation with avgRiskScore
properties.filtering_suggestions: Filter by poor health (<60), Filter by excellent health (>90), Compare divisions
properties.aggregation_suggestions: AVERAGE across divisions, RANK, MAX, MIN

properties.description: Risk trend direction for the division (7-day comparison).
properties.business_rules: Can be null for first assessment, Valid values: 'Improving', 'Deteriorating', 'Stable'
properties.business_description: Directional indicator for divisional performance tracking and intervention prioritization.
properties.data_quality_checks: Validate against allowed values
properties.filtering_suggestions: Filter by Deteriorating for priority attention

properties.description: Number of unique managers in the division.
properties.business_rules: Cannot be null, Must be > 0
properties.business_description: Management capacity indicator for workload distribution and escalation planning.
properties.data_quality_checks: Ensure positive values, Validate against User_csod
properties.filtering_suggestions: Filter by division

properties.description: Manager with highest average team risk score in division.
properties.business_rules: Can be null if unable to determine
properties.business_description: Identifies managers requiring additional support or intervention due to high team risk.
properties.data_quality_checks: Validate against User_csod manager names
properties.filtering_suggestions: Filter by specific managers

properties.description: Indicates if division is a best practice performer.
properties.business_rules: Cannot be null, Valid values: 'Yes', 'No', Based on top quartile performance
properties.business_description: Identifies high-performing divisions for knowledge sharing and best practice replication.
properties.data_quality_checks: Validate against allowed values, Ensure consistent with rankings
properties.filtering_suggestions: Filter by Yes for benchmarking

properties.description: Priority level for compliance intervention resources.
properties.business_rules: Cannot be null, Valid values: 'Urgent', 'High', 'Medium', 'Low'
properties.business_description: Resource allocation priority based on risk level, trend, and organizational impact.
properties.data_quality_checks: Validate against allowed values
properties.filtering_suggestions: Filter by Urgent and High, Prioritize interventions

properties.description: Gold layer table containing division-level aggregated compliance risk metrics enabling organizational comparison, accountability, and targeted intervention strategies.
properties.business_purpose: Enables divisional scorecards, peer benchmarking, resource allocation optimization, and divisional leader performance evaluation for compliance effectiveness.
properties.data_lineage: Aggregated from ComplianceRisk_Silver table with daily refresh, grouped by division from User_csod organizational hierarchy.
properties.data_retention: Data retained for 3 years for trend analysis and performance comparisons.
properties.key_relationships: Aggregates from ComplianceRisk_Silver, joins with User_csod for division hierarchy
properties.queryPatterns: ["Filter by division for divisional risk reporting", "Filter by assessmentDate for time-series analysis", "Group by division for organizational comparison", "Calculate aggregate risk metrics (avgRiskScore, totalHighRiskAssignments) by division", "Join with User_csod for organizational context", "Compare divisions using peer benchmarking metrics", "Filter by riskLevel for divisional risk prioritization", "Calculate division-level completion rates"]
properties.useCases: ["Divisional Scorecards: Generate division-level compliance risk summaries", "Peer Benchmarking: Compare compliance risk metrics across divisions", "Resource Allocation: Identify divisions requiring compliance resources", "Divisional Accountability: Track division leader performance on compliance effectiveness", "Organizational Comparison: Compare compliance risk levels across organizational segments", "Strategic Planning: Use divisional data for targeted compliance strategies", "Trend Analysis: Track division-level risk trends over time", "Performance Tracking: Measure divisional compliance intervention effectiveness"]

relationships.name: source_assessments_relationship
relationships.condition: ComplianceRisk_Division.division = User_csod.division AND User_csod.userId = ComplianceRisk_Silver.userId AND ComplianceRisk_Division.assessmentDate = DATE(ComplianceRisk_Silver.assessmentDate)

properties.displayName: Division Aggregates to Source Assessments Relationship
properties.description: Each division summary aggregates all user-activity risk assessments for that division via User_csod.division
Division metrics linked to organizational hierarchy
